title: useServerPrepStmts useLocalTransactionState cause first execute rollback failure
poc: CREATE TABLE `xyz` (`id` int NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`)) ENGINE=InnoDB;
key_bug_features: useServerPrepStmts and useLocalTransactionState both set to true
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `xyz` (`id` int NOT NULL, `name` varchar(50), `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY(`id`)) ENGINE=InnoDB;
